programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) Warren face a new challenge.Mysterious forces threaten the life of their daughter, Judy.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Many years before Snow White's birth, Queen Ravenna (Charlize Theron) observes the actions of her sister, Freya (Emily Blunt), who is in love with a man named Andrew.Soon their daughter is born.Shortly thereafter, the child is murdered.At the same time, Freya discovers that she has the power to control ice.The woman leaves Ravenna's lands with a broken heart.He creates his own kingdom and an army of deadly hunters.There is only one rule in their ranks: never to love.It is broken by two warriors - Eric (Chris Hemsworth) and Sara (Jessica Chastain).Freya decides to separate them.Seven years later, after Ravenna's death, Snow White decides to get rid of the evil queen's mirror, moving it to the sanctuary.Some time later, William informs Eric that the soldiers who were responsible for the expedition have gone missing.The hunter suspects Freya - the mirror could significantly increase her power.He agrees to complete the mission, with the help of the dwarves.

programme.title: Le cinéma de Terry Gilliam : l'imagination au pouvoir
programme.desc: A look at the artistic achievements of Terry Gilliam, screenwriter, director, actor and animator.From the comedy "Brazil" to the painting "The Man Who Killed Don Quixote", through the works of the Monty Python cabaret.

programme.title: The Goldsmith's Secret
programme.desc: 1999. Goldsmith Juan Pablo travels from Spain to New York for an exhibition of his works.On the way he passes through his hometown.He will meet Celia, a great love who changed his life.

programme.title: Barry
programme.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programme.title: Barry
programme.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

credits.actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
programme.desc: The Hobbit Frodo Baggins comes into possession of a magical Ring.His relative Bilbo obtained it during his expedition to the Lonely Mountain.This extraordinary gem can give its owner control over the world, which is why its creator - the Lord of Darkness Sauron - will do anything to get it back.The wizard Gandalf knows that the Ring must be destroyed.There is only one way to do this - by throwing him into the fire that burns inside Mount Doom.However, getting there is very difficult.A council is called in Rivendell on this matter.Frodo undertakes a dangerous mission to destroy the jewel.He is accompanied by his friendly hobbits, Sam Gamgee and Pippin and Merry, as well as representatives of other races: the elf Legolas, the dwarf Gimli, people - Aragorn and Boromir - and Gandalf.The ring has a sinister power that is difficult to avoid.It arouses strong desire and influences the psyche, which puts the team to the test.Meanwhile, Sauron sends his troops against her.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: The only companion of the lonely and malicious Grinch is the dog Max. The green creature only leaves the cave in search of food.Meanwhile, the residents of Whosiów are eagerly awaiting a special time of the year, Christmas.Wanting to keep the peace, the Grinch plans to spoil the grand celebrations and kidnap Santa Claus.At the same time, Cindy-Lou and her friends intend to capture a Lappish benefactor to thank him for helping the girl's busy mother.Two opposing intentions will face an inevitable confrontation.Another film adaptation of the adventures of a character created by a children's book writer, Dr.Seuss.Previously, Jim Carrey played the green creature in the 2000 film "The Grinch: No Christmas."In the Polish language version, the characters were voiced by, among others:Jarosław Boberek, Lila Wassermann, Ewa Prus and Karol Kwiatkowski.The carol was performed by Katarzyna Owczarz, Małgorzata Szymańska, Adam Krylik and Krzysztof Pietrzak.

programme.title: King Charles III
programme.desc: After the death of Elizabeth II, her son Charles (Tim Pigott-Smith) takes over power in Great Britain.During his first meeting with Prime Minister Tristan Evans (Adam James), he learns about the draft law regulating the rights of the press, which has already been adopted by both the House of Commons and the House of Lords and is only awaiting the king's consent.Charles refuses to sign it, fearing that the new law will limit press freedom and allow the government to use censorship.Then, due to the prime minister's threat to introduce the law without royal consent, he dissolves parliament.Soon a wave of protests begins to sweep across the country, with the most violent taking place in London.The difficult situation at Buckingham Palace is not improved by a sex scandal involving the ruler's younger son, Prince Henry (Richard Goulding), related to the publication of compromising photos of him with his lover, Jessica (Tamara Lawrance).Charles's older son, William (Oliver Chris), and his wife Catherine (Charlotte Riley) also do not support the king.The young man accuses his father of causing the crisis and demands that he abdicate.A film version of Mike Bartlett's play of the same title.The author is also the author of the script for this production.

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programme.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programme.title: The Pitt
programme.desc: Staff members are following up on information about a stolen ambulance.They also place bets.Michael removes the endotracheal tube from Mr. Spencer.He also tries to comfort his children.Nurse Mateo Diaz is insulted by racist Doug Driscoll, who is upset about the long time he has spent in the waiting room.Javadi sews up a patient's wound and corrects an error in her medical records.Mel and Mohan treat a baby with hair wrapped around a part of its body, creating a kind of tourniquet.Dana and the other nurses tend to Mr. Krakozhia, who is waiting for a bed in the psychiatric ward.They have trouble giving him the injection.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Unit 234
programme.desc: Laurie Saltair (Isabelle Fuhrman) arrives for the night shift at her family's remote warehouse with cubicles for rent.She's alone there.At one point, she is visited by a man who introduces himself as Benjamin Salgado (Don Johnson).Despite the late hour, he wants to go to room 234. Laurie asks him to leave, and when he looks into the stall, he is horrified to find a man inside, Clayton (Jack Huston), who has been chained to a stretcher and is about to become an organ donor.It soon turns out that Salgado is not alone, but that they are leading a group of people, ready to do anything to take the kidnapped person with them.Laurie must fight for his life, but also for her own.

programme.title: I Saw the TV Glow
programme.desc: The year is 1996. Two alienated teenagers, Owen (Justice Smith) and Maddy (Brigette Lundy-Paine), reach an understanding in the school corridor.They share a fascination with the late-night TV series "The Pink Opaque."Its heroines, Tara (Lindsey Jordan) and Isabel (Helena Howard), although they live in different parts of the USA, use their spiritual bond to fight a villain called Mr. Melancholia (Emma Portner).Over time, both Maddy and Owen begin to believe that the world of their favorite production is more real than the reality in which they live.Two years later, Maddy admits to a friend that she is planning to escape.Her disappearance coincides with "The Pink Opaque" being taken off the air.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programme.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programme.title: Good Guy With A Gun
programme.desc: After the violent death of his father, teenage Will (Beck Nolan) and his mother, Tessa Greenwood (Tiffany Bedwell), move to a small town in Illinois.There is a house they inherited from an ancestor, which the woman intends to sell.There, Will meets boys his own age and quickly becomes friends with them.The new friends are fascinated by the weapons each of them has and spend time practicing their shooting skills.Will begins to share their passion, which even worsens his already not good relationship with his mother, complicates the mourning for his father, and even puts the boy's life in danger.

programme.title: The Grinch
programme.desc: The only companion of the lonely and malicious Grinch is the dog Max. The green creature only leaves the cave in search of food.Meanwhile, the residents of Whosiów are eagerly awaiting a special time of the year, Christmas.Wanting to keep the peace, the Grinch plans to spoil the grand celebrations and kidnap Santa Claus.At the same time, Cindy-Lou and her friends intend to capture a Lappish benefactor to thank him for helping the girl's busy mother.Two opposing intentions will face an inevitable confrontation.Another film adaptation of the adventures of a character created by a children's book writer, Dr.Seuss.Previously, Jim Carrey played the green creature in the 2000 film "The Grinch: No Christmas."In the Polish language version, the characters were voiced by, among others:Jarosław Boberek, Lila Wassermann, Ewa Prus and Karol Kwiatkowski.The carol was performed by Katarzyna Owczarz, Małgorzata Szymańska, Adam Krylik and Krzysztof Pietrzak.

programme.title: Hitch
programme.desc: Alex Hitchens experienced heartbreak years ago.He decided that he would never fall in love again, but at the same time he decided to serve other men and share with them his knowledge about women's nature.Since then, he has been involved in a rather unusual profession - advising on how to seduce girls.He prides himself on the fact that he can turn every client into a reliable, self-confident pickup artist.Makes every effort to maintain anonymity.Despite this, he easily obtains subsequent lucrative orders.Hitchens' new client is a humble accountant named Albert, who has fallen in love with the beautiful heiress of a fortune, Allegra Cole.She feels that she has no chance because of her overweight and shyness.Alex meets journalist Sara, who is supposed to interview Allegra.He falls in love with her at first sight.It turns out that in this case his methods fail.As he gradually gains Sara's affection, she discovers his shameful secret...

programme.title: The Queen Of My Dreams
programme.desc: The year is 1999. Azra (Amrit Kaur) comes from Pakistan and attends an acting school in Toronto, where she lives with her girlfriend.Due to differences in worldviews, the young woman's relationship with her mother, a strict and very religious Muslim, Mariam (Nimra Bucha), and her father, Hassan (Hamza Haq), are strained.When her second parent dies suddenly, she decides to visit her home country.Once there, he embarks on a journey inspired by Bollywood films through memories, both real and imagined, from his mother's youth spent in Karachi to his own childhood in rural Canada.

programme.title: Barry
programme.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programme.title: Barry
programme.sub-title: Listen With Your Ears, React With Your Face
programme.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programme.title: Ghostlight
programme.desc: Grieving construction worker Dan (Keith Kupferer) joins a local theater group working on a production of Romeo and Juliet.There are changes in his life.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: The Fellowship of the Ring has been broken.Frodo and Sam continue their journey to Mordor - the only place where the Ring can be destroyed.They manage to capture Gollum, one of the previous owners of the magical gem.Frodo decides to trust him.She makes him her guide.Meanwhile, Gandalf the Gray fights the Balrog, the Demon of Power.After the duel, the wizard is reborn as Gandalf the White.He joins Aragorn, Legolas the elf and Gimli the dwarf as they journey to Rohan.They must warn the local ruler Théoden about the war.It turns out that he can no longer rule.His faith and strength were robbed by a curse cast by Saruman.Merry and Pippin escape from orc captivity to Fangorn - an ancient forest.Treebeard, the shepherd of trees, takes care of them there.Middle-earth is threatened by great danger - Sauron, ruler of Mordor, and the wizard Saruman, lord of Isengard, unite their forces.Troops of wild Uruk-hai are growing in strength.The day of the Battle of Helm's Deep is approaching.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight With John Oliver 13
programme.desc: Another season of a show full of irony and sarcasm, hosted by John Oliver.In each episode, the host summarizes the events from the world of politics from the last week.

programme.title: Towards the sun
programme.desc: The year 2057. People are increasingly concerned about what is happening to the Sun.It seems to be losing power, and the Earth dependent on it is gradually becoming covered with ice.Scientists are sending an expedition towards the Sun whose task is to place a powerful nuclear charge on its surface.Experts predict that such an explosion will stimulate the star's activity and thus save the world from destruction.After some time, however, it turns out that a similar mission had already taken place seven years earlier, but then none of the crew managed to return to Earth.This time, eight people are sent into space, commanded by the experienced Captain Kaneda.The Icarus II board includes, among others:Cassie, Capa, Corazon and Mace.It quickly turns out that someone is making every effort to prevent the expedition members from reaching their goal.Soon, one of the pilots makes a fatal mistake and deprives the crew of oxygen supplies.In addition, unexpectedly, the ship begins to receive warning signals from its predecessor.The situation is becoming more and more dramatic.

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen
